channel.title: Unifyl Updates
channel.description: Unifyl — AI-Powered Dual-Pane File Manager for macOS

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Unifyl 1.0.1 — April 15, 2026

⭐ Korean / Japanese archive support

  • Fixed: Extracting ZIPs with CP949/EUC-KR/Shift-JIS filenames now works. Previously the archive opened but every file failed with "caution: filename not matched".

Thumbnail grid now matches list view (⌃G)

  • Shift/Cmd multi-select and rubber-band drag-select
  • Drag multiple files to Finder or the other pane at once
  • Option-to-copy on drop with drop-highlight overlay

Stability & Performance

  • File move falls back to copy+remove across volumes (EXDEV) — no more failures when copying to an external USB
  • Spotlight searches no longer stall the UI on thousand-result hits
  • Duplicate scan runs pair scoring in parallel (TaskGroup per size bucket)
  • Canceling a media conversion now terminates ffmpeg and removes the partial output
  • License and WebDAV calls have explicit timeouts

Security hardening

  • SFTP / FTP / WebDAV refuse remote paths with C0 control characters — blocks shell/HTTP-header injection via crafted filenames
  • Temp credential files (askpass, .netrc) use O_CREAT|O_EXCL|O_NOFOLLOW against symlink attacks
  • Zip-slip boundary check tightened

Silent-failure fixes

  • Natural-language commands, "Keep Best" duplicate removal, hardlink replacement, PDF Replace, LibreOffice conversion — every path that used try? now surfaces errors

Accessibility & localization

  • File permissions dialog uses status icons + color (not color-only)
  • Regex-rename match highlight legible in dark mode
  • File date column follows the user's system locale

Full changelog

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Unifyl 1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Dual-pane file management with tabs and workspaces
  • AI-powered semantic search, smart tagging, and AI rename
  • Archive virtual folders (ZIP, 7z, TAR, RAR, and more)
  • 10 built-in viewers (text, hex, image, PDF, video, audio, web, markdown, code, media info)
  • Advanced search with Smart Folders
  • File compare, directory sync, and 3-way merge
  • Git integration, inline terminal, and developer tools
  • 12 themes, SVG icon packs, and 120+ custom keyboard shortcuts
  • Cloud and remote connections (FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, S3, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive)
  • Full VoiceOver accessibility support
